caption: The video features a man standing on stage, addressing an audience with a microphone positioned in front of him. He is wearing glasses and a white shirt paired with a black vest adorned with intricate blue embroidery and a red pendant. The background consists of wooden slats, giving the setting a warm and rustic feel. The audience, visible in the foreground, appears attentive, with their heads turned towards the speaker. The man seems to be engaged in delivering a speech or performance, as he maintains a focused expression throughout the sequence. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner, suggesting that the event may be related to this organization.
